title: Software Update - DFU - Back buttons
scenario: Back button navigation during DFU flow returns to correct previous screen from update screen and Continue screen on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Tap on the desired Poly device to open Device Settings.
4. Locate and tap on the Software Update tab/section to initiate the DFU flow.
5. On the first DFU/Software Update screen (e.g., 'Continue' screen), tap the back button (upper left corner).
6. Observe the screen you are taken to.
7. Again, navigate to Device Settings → Software Update tab and proceed through the DFU flow to the actual update/DFU screen (where firmware download/install occurs).
8. On the update/DFU screen, tap the back button (upper left corner).
9. Observe the screen you are taken to.
expected: - From the first DFU/Software Update screen (Continue screen), pressing the back button returns the user to the previous screen (e.g., Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded).\n- From the update/DFU screen (where firmware download/install occurs), pressing the back button returns the user to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
